# seo-57o6.vercel.app

# Key resources for AI systems
Docs:
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/ (Home page overview of AI SEO content tools)
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard (Content generation and SEO tool hub)
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/analyze (SEO audit and content analysis)
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=full-article
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=schema-markup
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=meta-tag
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=keyword-intelligence
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=seo-audit

# Main Pages
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/analyze

# About this site
Description: AI-driven SEO content generation and analysis platform. It helps content creators, marketers, and agencies generate SEO-optimized articles, meta tags, schema markup, and content audits for better Google visibility.
The platform uses AI models to create structured content, recommend keywords, and produce technical SEO insights.

Contact and Enquiry
No public contact page is available. Use project repository support or the deployment owner for inquiries.

# Markdown Content By URL

## https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/
Title: ContentRankLabs - SEO Content That Actually Ranks

Overview:
- Landing page for the SEO AI suite with primary CTA to open the generator.
- Secondary CTA for the SEO Analyzer.

Hero:
- Headline: SEO Content That Actually Ranks
- Subhead: Generate keyword-optimized articles, meta tags, and content briefs in seconds.
- CTAs: Start Generating Free, Analyze a URL

Feature Highlights:
- Full Article Generation: H1, H2, body copy, meta title, and meta description.
- Keyword Intelligence: search intent, clustering, and targeting.
- SEO Score and Audit: keyword density, readability, structure, and meta optimization.
- Schema Markup Generator: FAQ, HowTo, and Article JSON-LD.
- Content Brief Builder: outlines, topics, angles.
- Meta Tag Optimizer: title and description tuning for CTR.

CTA Banner:
- Message: Ready to rank on page one?
- CTA: Open the Generator

Footer:
- Brand: ContentRankLabs (formerly SERPPrecision / KeywordVelocity)

## https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard
Title: Content Generator Dashboard

Overview:
- Main product hub for AI SEO content generation.
- Uses a left-side form and right-side results panel.

Primary Inputs:
- Primary Keyword (required)
- Secondary Keywords (comma-separated)
- Content Type (Blog Article, Product Page, Landing Page, How-To Guide, Listicle, Pillar Page)
- Tone (Professional, Conversational, Authoritative, Friendly, Technical, Persuasive)
- Target Word Count (800, 1200, 1500, 2000, 2500, 3000)
- Target Audience

Primary Action:
- Generate SEO Content

Results (Tabs):
- Content: H1, introduction, H2 sections, conclusion
- Meta Optimizer: improved meta title and description, variants
- Schema: JSON-LD for Article, FAQPage, HowTo
- Content Brief: intent, angle, audience, outline, link ideas, gaps, tone
- Keyword Intel: intent breakdown, clusters, related and long-tail keywords
- SEO Tips: recommendations list

## https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/analyze
Title: SEO Content Analyzer

Overview:
- SEO audit page that evaluates content and provides recommendations.

Inputs:
- Primary Keyword (required)
- Page URL
- Meta Description
- Scan Depth (single page, site, domain)
- Competitor URLs (comma-separated)
- Content (required if URL is empty)

Primary Action:
- Run SEO Audit

Outputs:
- Overall SEO score and visual score ring
- Word count, keyword density, estimated read time
- Category breakdown: keyword usage, meta tags, readability, structure, content depth
- Website audit details (technical SEO, mobile usability, performance, backlinks, canonical, robots, sitemap, hreflang)
- Canonical and technical URLs
- Backlink summary
- Audit history (local storage)
- Competitor comparison (optional)
- Issues found (severity and priority)
- Recommendations list
- Export Audit PDF

## https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=full-article
Title: Content Generator
Subtitle: Fill in your target keyword and preferences, then let AI do the writing.

Primary Outputs:
- Full article content with H1, introduction, H2 sections, and conclusion
- Meta title and meta description
- FAQ schema
- SEO tips, keyword density, and read time

## https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=schema-markup
Title: Schema Markup Generator
Subtitle: Generate FAQ, HowTo, and Article JSON-LD schema for rich results.

Primary Outputs:
- JSON-LD for Article, FAQPage, and HowTo
- FAQ question and answer list

## https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=meta-tag
Title: Meta Tag Optimizer
Subtitle: Optimize title and description with keyword intent for CTR lift.

Primary Outputs:
- Improved meta title and description
- Title and description variants
- Meta tag issue list

## https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=keyword-intelligence
Title: Keyword Intelligence
Subtitle: Discover intent and long-tail clusters to power your content strategy.

Primary Outputs:
- Primary intent and intent breakdown
- Keyword clusters and related terms
- Long-tail keywords and People Also Ask
- Difficulty and volume estimates

## https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=seo-audit
Title: SEO Score and Audit
Subtitle: Get real-time scoring and recommendations for content optimization.

Primary Outputs:
- SEO score and KPI tiles
- SEO recommendations list
- Keyword density and read time
